products.name: Classic Floral Birthday Cake
products.description: A beautifully decorated birthday cake adorned with handcrafted sugar flowers. Available in a variety of flavours and sizes to suit every celebration.

products.name: Chocolate Drip Cake
products.description: Rich, indulgent chocolate cake with a gorgeous drip finish, topped with fresh berries and delicate gold leaf accents.

products.name: Rainbow Layer Cake
products.description: A vibrant showstopper with multi-coloured layers inside and smooth pastel frosting outside. The ultimate birthday centrepiece.

products.name: Minimalist Buttercream Cake
products.description: Elegant and modern, this understated beauty features smooth palette-knife textured buttercream with subtle floral accents.

products.name: Elegant White Wedding Cake
products.description: A stunning three-tier wedding cake decorated with delicate hand-piped lacework and fresh white blooms. Serves 80–100 guests.

products.name: Rustic Floral Wedding Cake
products.description: A romantic two-tier cake with a textured naked-buttercream finish and cascading fresh floral accents. Serves 50–70 guests.

products.name: Modern Geometric Wedding Cake
products.description: A sleek, contemporary design with geometric fondant panels and brushed gold metallic accents. Perfect for the modern couple. Serves 80+ guests.

products.name: Sculpted Character Cake
products.description: A fully sculpted and hand-painted cake featuring any character, theme, or figure. Every detail is tailored to your vision — truly one of a kind.

products.name: Edible Photo Print Cake
products.description: A delicious cake featuring an edible printed photo of your choice — perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, and graduations.

products.name: Themed Celebration Cake
products.description: Fully customised to any theme — sports, hobbies, movies, careers, and more. Every detail is crafted to bring your idea to life.

products.name: Assorted Cupcakes — Box of 12
products.description: A gorgeous gift box of 12 cupcakes in assorted flavours, each topped with decorative buttercream swirls. Ideal for parties and gifting.

products.name: Custom Frosted Cupcakes — Box of 12
products.description: Beautifully frosted cupcakes personalised with your choice of flavour, colour, and decorations. Perfect for any occasion.

products.name: Mini Cupcake Tower — 24 Pieces
products.description: An impressive tiered tower of 24 beautifully decorated mini cupcakes. A stunning centrepiece and a crowd favourite at any event.

products.name: Eid Celebration Cake
products.description: A stunning cake celebrating Eid, adorned with crescent and star motifs, gold leaf accents, and festive floral details. Perfect for your gathering.

products.name: Valentine's Heart Cake
products.description: A romantic heart-shaped cake made for Valentine's Day or anniversaries. Decorated with velvety red roses and gold foil details.

products.name: New Year Celebration Cake
products.description: Ring in the New Year in style with a showstopping celebration cake featuring champagne-inspired designs, gold lustre, and sparkle accents.

products.name: Dark Chocolate Kisses Cake
products.description: Three layers of intensely rich dark chocolate sponge coated in smooth, glossy ganache and finished with hand-piped chocolate rosettes, each crowned with a gold-foiled Hershey's Kiss. Decadent, dramatic, and made entirely for chocolate lovers.

products.name: Sesame Seed Sourdough Loaf
products.description: A hand-shaped round loaf slow-fermented for a deep, nutty flavour and an open, chewy crumb, with a crackling golden crust generously coated in toasted black sesame seeds. Baked fresh to order and best enjoyed warm from the bag.

products.name: Spiced Carrot Cake with Glacé Cherries
products.description: Warmly spiced carrot cake layers enveloped in silky cream cheese frosting, patterned with elegant concentric swirls across the top and crowned with glossy glacé cherries and sprigs of fresh rosemary. Tender, subtly sweet, and beautifully refined.

products.name: Red Velvet Naked Cake with Fresh Strawberries
products.description: Three striking layers of deep crimson velvet sponge left intentionally exposed, with generous cream cheese frosting piped between each tier and a crown of hand-piped rosettes and glistening fresh strawberries. Bold, romantic, and impossible to walk past.

products.name: Carrot & Walnut Cake with Cherries
products.description: A generously spiced carrot and walnut cake cloaked in caramel-hued cream cheese frosting textured with sweeping hand-crafted waves, finished with clusters of glazed cherries, crushed walnuts, and sprigs of fresh rosemary. Rich, nutty, and unmistakably artisan.

products.name: Red Velvet Strawberry Cheesecake
products.description: A silky, cloud-light cheesecake blanketed in a fine dusting of red velvet crumbs and crowned with a generous ring of plump, glossy fresh strawberries. The contrast of tangy cream cheese, tender crumb coating, and sweet ripe berries makes every slice extraordinary.

products.name: Blueberry & Floral Cheesecake
products.description: A rich baked cheesecake glazed with jewel-dark blueberry compote and piled high with plump fresh blueberries, adorned with vibrant cosmos blooms for a presentation as breathtaking as it is delicious. A true centrepiece worthy of any celebration.

products.name: Mixed Berry Cheesecake
products.description: A classic baked cheesecake bordered with hand-piped cream rosettes, finished with a glistening berry compote, an abundance of blueberries and fresh strawberries, and delicate thyme sprigs. Elegant, fresh, and satisfying to the last bite.

products.name: Lemon Curd & Thyme Cake
products.description: A light, airy cake wrapped in smooth whipped cream and crowned with a luminous pool of golden lemon curd, dressed with caramelised lemon slices and a delicate garland of fresh thyme. Bright, zesty, and elegantly understated.

products.name: Classic Sourdough Loaf
products.description: A traditionally leavened sourdough with a blistered, golden crust and an open, chewy crumb — the result of a long cold ferment. Available plain or with additions such as cranberry and walnut or mixed seeds; baked fresh to order.

products.name: Sourdough Loaf Gift Set
products.description: Two freshly baked sourdough loaves of your choice — classic, sesame, or walnut — sliced and presented in signature Tanyabake branded kraft bags with our handcrafted seal. A thoughtful, delicious gift for any bread lover.
